Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Looking for audio (sanskrit verse)

Sadhana · asked by user [] · 2010-01-29 · 1 answers
I am looking for audio for the following Srimad Bhagavatam Prayer verses (plan to receite a few of these on a dialy basis)

Prayers of Queen Kunti (krisnaya vasudevaya '85)
Prayers of Bhisma deva (yam manyase matuleyam'85sva nigamam apahaya '85)
Prayers of Dhruva Maharaj
Prayers of Prahalad Maharaj
Prayers of Uddhava (aho baki yam stana kalakutam '85)
Prayers of Gajendra
Prayers of Brahma, Indra
Prayers of Gopis (tava kathamrtam '85)
user [482] · 2010-01-31
Found a few here (sri vaisnava recitation : Prayers by Kunti/Bhisma) http://www.raaga.com/channels/sanskrit/moviedetail.asp?mid=S0000063
And Gopi Geeta (first 9) http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=enDkYsTtLfQ
Prayers by Prahalada http://www.krishna.com/en/node/1927
